description: QuantMail Gmail-Killer Screen Depth - Enhance inbox with virtualized list, swipe actions, 3-pane desktop layout. Upgrade compose with rich text toolbar, schedule send, undo send. Upgrade thread view with collapsible quotes, inline reply, AI summarize chips, attachment gallery. Add full-text search with advanced filters. Add labels/folders sidebar with drag-to-label and custom label creation.
steps: 1. Enhance apps/quantmail/src/app/page.tsx inbox: Add desktop 3-pane layout (sidebar | list | preview), virtualized email list using react-virtuoso for performance, swipe-to-archive/delete on mobile with framer-motion gesture detection, mark-as-read batch action in toolbar.

2. Upgrade apps/quantmail/src/components/EmailComposer.tsx: Add a formatting toolbar row (bold/italic/underline/lists/link/code), AI tone buttons (Professional/Friendly/Concise/Expand), drag-drop attachment zone with progress indicator, schedule send with date/time picker dropdown, undo-send countdown toast (5s timer).

3. Enhance apps/quantmail/src/app/thread/[id]/page.tsx: Add collapsible quoted text detection (lines starting with >) with 'Show quoted text' toggle, inline quick-reply textarea at bottom of each message, AI summarize chip button that calls existing AI compose endpoint, attachment gallery grid with thumbnails for images and file icons for documents.

4. Create apps/quantmail/src/app/search/page.tsx: Full-text search page with filter chips (from:, to:, has:attachment, in:label, date range), search results as email cards with highlighted matches, recent searches stored in localStorage.

5. Enhance apps/quantmail/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Add label list with unread counts and colored dots, drag-email-to-label functionality, 'Create label' button with inline form (name + color picker), collapsible sections (Inbox/Sent/Drafts/Trash/Labels).
6. Add motion variants for all new interactions in apps/quantmail/src/lib/motion-variants.ts: swipe variants, expand/collapse variants, toast slide-up variant.
acceptance_criteria: QuantMail inbox renders with category tabs, batch toolbar, and skeleton loading
Compose page has formatting toolbar, AI assist buttons, Cc/Bcc expansion, schedule send UI, and undo send toast
Thread view shows collapsible quotes, inline reply, AI summarize chip, and attachment gallery
Search page with filter chips renders and connects to search API
Sidebar shows labels with counts and has create-label form
TypeScript compiles without errors for all quantmail changes
